message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title HTTP/2 Connection and Stream Lifecycle

participant "ConnectInterceptor" as CI
participant "StreamAllocation" as SA
participant "RealConnection" as RC
participant "Http2Connection" as H2C
participant "CallServerInterceptor" as CSI
participant "Http2Codec" as Codec
participant "Http2Writer" as Writer
participant "Sink" as Sink
participant "Socket" as Socket
participant "ReaderRunnable" as Reader
participant "Http2Read" as Read
participant "Http2Stream" as Stream
participant "Source" as Source

CI -> SA: newStream
activate SA
SA -> RC: connect
activate RC
RC -> H2C: start()
activate H2C

CSI -> Codec: writeRequestHeaders
activate Codec
Codec --> H2C: newStream
deactivate Codec

H2C -> Writer: synStream
activate Writer
Writer -> Sink: write
activate Sink
Sink -> Socket: 
deactivate Sink
deactivate Writer

CSI -> Sink: write
activate Sink
deactivate Sink

H2C -> Reader: execute()
activate Reader
Reader -> Read: nextFrame()
activate Read
Read --> H2C: handle
deactivate Read
deactivate Reader

H2C -> Stream: receiveXXX()
activate Stream
Stream -> Source: read()
activate Source
Source --> Stream: 
deactivate Source
deactivate Stream

deactivate H2C
deactivate RC
deactivate SA

@enduml
```
